query:
SELECT 
  ir.questionId,
  ir.response,
  ir.sectionTitle
FROM intakeResponses ir
JOIN organizations o ON ir.organizationId = o.id
WHERE o.slug = 'munson'
ORDER BY ir.sectionTitle, ir.questionId;
